visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a pink envelope featuring two cartoon characters, a boy and a girl, under the text 'CHUCHUMEI' and 'Thank You'. A hand enters from the right to touch the envelope. (2) The perspective shifts to unboxing a white cardboard box filled with brown honeycomb packing paper. A hand pulls back the paper to reveal bubble-wrapped items underneath. (3) The camera pans to a TV screen in a living room setting, displaying a YouTube video with a thumbnail featuring the same cartoon style. (4) A hand holds up a series of cards, including one with a 'Have a nice day!' greeting and a handwritten letter in Chinese characters. (5) A white book titled 'Marriage certificate' is presented, featuring a holographic rainbow and cartoon characters. The hand turns the pages to show English and Chinese text inside. (6) The camera zooms into specific details of the certificate, highlighting the 'Her Vows' and 'His Vows' sections. (7) A close-up reveals a spelling error in the holographic text, where 'Forever' is spelled as 'Forver'.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: CHUCHUMEI. [Slogan]: Thank you. I hope you have a nice day :). (2) [Subtitle]: OK 不知道啾啾妹送了我什麼東西. [Subtitle]: 感覺是炸彈. (3) [Subtitle]: 哇嗚 欸 他不是說沒有貨了嗎. (4) [Subtitle]: oh my god 這是啾啾妹的結婚書約耶. [Subtitle]: 偷偷暗扛. (5) [Slogan]: Have a nice day!. [Subtitle]: 就跟妳說他很喜歡我齁. [Subtitle]: 還偷偷為我們留了一個. (6) [Subtitle]: 而且重點是我還在看他那個耶. [Subtitle]: 結婚妳真的準備好了嗎. (7) [Subtitle]: 天啊 也太可愛了吧. (8) [Slogan]: Marriage certificate. [Subtitle]: 看到說什麼. (9) [Variety]: 自尊心好合. (10) [Slogan]: May your marriage be like a wonderful symphony. [Slogan]: Filled with harmony and delight. (11) [Subtitle]: 英文也太差. [Subtitle]: 欸 等一下 我發現一個錯字欸. [Variety]: Forver.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Only the hands of one male person are visible throughout the video while interacting with objects.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male hands, appearing with natural skin tone, interacting with packaging and stationery.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: An indoor domestic setting with a wooden desk, a white unboxing box, and a living room background featuring a TV on a stand with speakers and various small items.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a male voice speaking enthusiastically in Mandarin about receiving a package. The environment is a quiet room. (2) A loud, crisp rustling sound occurs as the user handles honeycomb paper and bubble wrap, lasting several seconds. (3) A female voice is heard briefly, muffled as if coming from a TV speaker, narrating about marriage. (4) A light, cheerful acoustic guitar BGM fades in. The male speaker's voice becomes more high-pitched and excited as he sees the 'Marriage certificate'. (5) A rhythmic 'thud' SFX occurs as items are placed on a desk. (6) The speaker reads an English quote from the book with a slow, deliberate pace and a playful intonation. (7) A sudden comical 'boing' or impact SFX triggers as the speaker discovers a spelling typo, followed by his loud, joyful laughter and repetitive exclamation of the mistake.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Unboxing -> Detailed Review -> Comedic Reveal
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video documents a fan or partner unboxing a 'Marriage Certificate' stationery set from the Taiwanese illustrator brand 'Chuchumei'. The intent is to showcase the product's cute design and details while providing a humorous ending by pointing out a significant English spelling error ('Forver') found on the product.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video centers entirely on opening a package from the brand 'Chuchumei' and showing the items in detail with the brand logo visible.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a mix of real-world unboxing and social media elements (YouTube screen) to build context before the product reveal.
